name: Quarterly Funnel Review
description: Quarterly review of funnel performance for marketing and revenue leadership. Replaces 1–2 days of manual assembly with a structured, defensible memo grounded in governed cohort definitions.
alsoSurfaces: What did the funnel produce this quarter: leads, MQLs, SQLs, won deals?
Where did conversion improve, and where did it decline?
How did velocity shift across stages?
What should leadership focus on next quarter?
beforeWeRun: Quarter to review: last completed, or custom?
Audience tone: marketing/revenue leadership (detailed) or board-ready (concise)?
Include rep/SDR-level detail: yes for internal, no for board?

whatYoullGet.name: Executive summary
whatYoullGet.desc: 3–5 sentences with total leads, blended conversion to closed-won, period-over-period direction, and the single most important takeaway about funnel health.

whatYoullGet.name: Funnel state
whatYoullGet.desc: Markdown table: stage pairs as rows, columns for review-quarter rate, comparison-quarter rate, delta, time-at-stage. Plus headline lead volume.

whatYoullGet.name: Conversion trends
whatYoullGet.desc: Two paragraphs on conversion-rate movements, with statistical confidence of the changes.

whatYoullGet.name: Velocity patterns
whatYoullGet.desc: Two paragraphs on velocity shifts and bottlenecks resolved or emerged.

whatYoullGet.name: Where the funnel is healthy and where it's leaking
whatYoullGet.desc: 3–5 paragraphs naming segments, sources, structural patterns vs cyclical movement.

whatYoullGet.name: Next quarter recommendations
whatYoullGet.desc: Stages to focus on, segments / sources to investigate, experiments or process changes to consider.

whatYoullGet.name: Sources & definitions
whatYoullGet.desc: Stage taxonomy, lifecycle windows, period boundaries, sources read with row counts.

callout: 4 quick inputs, then Sage drafts your quarterly review in ~16 min.
